rationale: Added minimal vstd imports, verus!{} wrapper, and standalone definitions for AbstractEndPoint, ID (single-field struct with view = self.ep), KeyTrait, VerusClone, and DelegationMap<K> with #[verifier::reject_recursive_types(K)].
